svg.title: Azure AI Agent Run lifecycle with function calling and human approval
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how a Run progresses from queued through requires_action with a human approval decision gate to completed or cancelled

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a Thread in Azure AI Agent Service?')
sendPrompt('What does queued status mean in an Azure AI Agent run?')
sendPrompt('What is requires_action status in Azure AI Agents?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement a human approval gate in Azure AI Agents?')
sendPrompt('How do I execute function calls in Azure AI Agents?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a Run completes in Azure AI Agents?')
sendPrompt('When should I cancel a run in Azure AI Agents?')
